author: kmccleary3301
title: do_import_run omits review_scope — auto-resolve treats partial replay as full sweep
notes: Real bug: do_import_run (orchestrator.py:320) omits review_scope/reviewed_files/assessment_coverage that _merge_and_write_results (execution.py:253) always sets. Missing full_sweep_included defaults to None, causing scoped_reimport=False at holistic_issue_flow.py:195. Auto-resolve then treats partial replay as full sweep, silently closing unrelated holistic issues. Original finding with clear repro path. Minor inaccuracy: _merge_and_write_results is in execution.py, not orchestrator.py.
